scripts.dev: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start web || bun run scripts/solar.ts dev start
scripts.build: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start build || bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.format: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start format || biome format --write .
scripts.format:check: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start format:check || biome format .
scripts.package: bun run build && bun build apps/server/src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' --external @struktoai/mirage-node && bun build apps/server/src/db/migrations/*.ts --root apps/server/src/db/migrations --outdir dist/migrations --target bun && rm -rf dist/web && mkdir -p dist/web && cp -R apps/server/dist/web/. dist/web
scripts.migrate: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start migrate || bun run --cwd apps/server migrate
scripts.migrate:auth: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start migrate:auth || bun run --cwd apps/server migrate:auth
scripts.codegen: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start codegen || bun run --cwd apps/server codegen
scripts.deploy:staging: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start deploy:staging || bun run scripts/deploy-staging.ts
scripts.typecheck: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start typecheck || (tsc -p apps/server/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json)
scripts.test: command -v paseo >/dev/null 2>&1 && paseo script start test || (bun run test:server && bun run test:web)
